approved"},{"stable_id":"measurement_definition_003","source_id":"meas_supply_current","status":"blocked_missing_probe_node","measurement_id":"meas_supply_current","signal":"IDD","definition":"average current between 2 ms and 3 ms","provenance":"synthetic fixture requested_measurements","basis":"contract_only_synthetic","owner_action":"provide approved probe node or current path definition for corners, and acquired model file references before execution","next_action":"downstream consumer may prepare draft deck inputs but must preserve blockers and review-required states","downstream_impact":"prevents treating this packet as simulation run authorization","not_claimed":"no simulation executed, no deck approved, no waveform measured, no pass/fail result claimed"}],"input_packet_blockers":[{"stable_id":"blocker_001","status":"blocking_execution","blocker":"simulator_policy_packet_missing_for_execution","provenance":"synthetic fixture blockers","basis":"required execution policy absent from packet","owner_action":"provide simulator policy packet","next_action":"hold execution authorization","downstream_impact":"simulation_deck_prepare_v0 must not proceed to execution","not_claimed":"not
